title: Horse Race Test
description: Replaces horses with the horses from the Horse Race Tests (@snakesandrews on twitter)
body:
This texture pack remodels & retextures horses so they look like the charming but simple horse designs from the "Horse Race Test" account on twitter (@snakesandrews)! I wanted to keep it faithful, so they follow the camera around as a billboard. Unfortunately, the rotation is still broken when they are lifting their legs up in the air (like when they kick you off while taming)

ETF/EMF or Optifine is required!
